products.name: Home Discovery Platform

interfaces.name: B2C Web Application
interfaces.description: Primary browser-based interface for property search, listing evaluation, alerts management, and contact flows.

interfaces.name: iOS Application
interfaces.description: Native iOS experience for search, saved alerts, push notifications, and inquiry management.

interfaces.name: Android Application
interfaces.description: Native Android experience aligned with iOS feature set.

interfaces.name: Email Alert System
interfaces.description: Transactional and behavioral email alerts for saved searches and inquiry updates.

interfaces.name: Push Notification Service
interfaces.description: Mobile push notifications for new matches and response updates.

interfaces.name: Search Engine (SEO)
interfaces.description: Organic search entry point where indexed property, area, and content pages drive discovery traffic back to the platform.

interfaces.name: Social Media
interfaces.description: Social platforms where shareable widgets and real estate information posts link users back to the platform.

interfaces.name: Mortgage Integration API
interfaces.description: API integration with financing partners for affordability calculation and prequalification.

interfaces.name: Listing Data API
interfaces.description: Controlled API access for ecosystem partners to retrieve listing and availability data.

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Drives discovery entry points and routes seekers into search and property exploration journeys.

deploymentChannels.deploymentUnit: Brick-specific backend service, worker, and data migration package
deploymentChannels.pipeline: Build, test, package, and promote the brick service through the standard CI/CD pipeline.

deploymentChannels.pipeline: Build static assets, run UI checks, and deploy the web bundle through the frontend pipeline.

deploymentChannels.pipeline: Build signed Android bundles, run mobile regression checks, and release in stages.

deploymentChannels.pipeline: Publish the service image, validate contracts, and promote gateway configuration across environments.

deploymentChannels.pipeline: Validate templates, package delivery workers, and promote channel configuration.

products.neededBricksMappingNote: This mapping is inferred by aligning the product description, interfaces, and customer journey with the product brick catalog.

products.name: Owner Platform

interfaces.name: Owner Web Application
interfaces.description: Browser-based dashboard for valuation, listing creation, performance tracking, and lead management.

interfaces.name: Owner iOS Application
interfaces.description: Mobile-optimized access to listing management and inquiry monitoring.

interfaces.name: Owner Android Application
interfaces.description: Mobile-optimized access to listing management and inquiry monitoring.

interfaces.name: Performance Analytics Dashboard
interfaces.description: Analytics interface displaying listing views, inquiries, pricing insights, and conversion signals.

interfaces.name: Agent Handoff API
interfaces.description: Structured routing interface to transfer high-intent owners to professional agents.

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Captures owner intent and valuation input at the start of the supply journey.

products.neededBricksMappingNote: This mapping is inferred by aligning the product description, interfaces, and customer journey with the product brick catalog.

products.name: Pro Agency Platform

interfaces.name: Pro Portal
interfaces.description: Primary B2B web interface for listing lifecycle management, visibility control, and lead handling.

interfaces.name: Listing Ingestion API
interfaces.description: API for bulk listing upload and synchronization with agency systems.

interfaces.name: CRM Integration API
interfaces.description: Bidirectional integration interface for lead and listing synchronization with external CRMs.

interfaces.name: ROI & Performance Dashboard
interfaces.description: Analytics interface showing lead performance, response time, ranking exposure, and ROI metrics.

products.neededBricksMappingNote: This mapping is inferred by aligning the product description, interfaces, and customer journey with the product brick catalog.
